query:
SELECT 
  p.cnj,
  p.status_resumido,
  p.status_original,
  p.ultima_atualizacao_api,
  p.advogado,
  p.parceiro,
  p.fonte_atualizacao,
  jr.status AS judit_status,
  jr.request_id,
  jr.created_at AS requisicao_criada
FROM processos p
LEFT JOIN judit_requests jr ON jr.cnj = p.cnj
WHERE p.ultima_atualizacao_api IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY p.ultima_atualizacao_api DESC
LIMIT 20;
